name: Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket - Birds Stripes - 3pk - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your little one comfy and in deep slumber with this 3-Pack Birds Stripes Muslin Swaddle Baby Blankets from cloud island™. This pack of baby blankets includes three square blankets — one with allover birds print, another with stripes and the third with a checkered pattern — to add a touch of lively style to their snuggle time. Made from cotton muslin fabric that's gentle against their delicate skin, this multipurpose baby blanket is great for comfortably nursing, cuddling and swaddling.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
